subcodes.first_line: Say: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I bear witness to that which Thou hast testified concerning Thine own Self before the creation of all things, that verily Thou art [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل سبحانک اللهم یا الهی اشهد بما شهدت بنفسک لنفسک قبل خلق الاشیاء بانک انت
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God
